title: Battat – Flying Disc Toy – 2 Launchers & 4 Discs – Helicopter Playset – Outdoor Toys For Summer – 3+ Years– Skyrocopter
features: FLYING DISC HELICOPTER: Discover and fly bright and colorful discs with this Skyrocopter spin toy. Launch the helicopter discs in the air by grabbing the handle of one of the 2 launcher toys and pulling the string.

YARD TOYS FOR KIDS: Keep your kids entertained anywhere. Take this flying toy with you to the park, playground, or even the treehouse in your backyard. These helicopter toys are sturdily constructed and designed for indoors or outdoors play.

PULL STRING LAUNCHER: Our flying helicopter toy is easy for even young kids to launch and fly. Simply hold steady, pull the string, and watch it fly through your yard or in your room on rainy days. Encourage exercise and reduce screen time with our yard toys.
WHAT’S INCLUDED: Includes 2 launchers – 1xBlue and 1xRed with 4 colorful flying discs – 1xGreen, 1xYellow, 1xOrange and 1xPurple.

COLORFUL DISC DESIGN: Bright colors and a lightweight feel, lets young kids around 3 years old and up take control of these flying discs. The string-powered design keeps this helicopter toy easy-to-use and uncomplicated without any need for batteries.
